Gaba 1-to-1 English Instructor - Applicants outside Japan

  • On-site
    • Tokyo, Chiba, Kanagawa, Saitama, Osaka, Kyoto, Kobe, Nagoya, Tokyo, Japan
  • Applying to Gaba from Outside Japan

Job description

Teach English in Japan with Gaba

 

Teaching with Gaba means a professional work environment, motivated adult students, and a flexible schedule. Teach in a major metropolitan area in one of our locations in the Kanto, Kansai, and Chubu regions (including Tokyo, Yokohama, Nagoya, and Osaka), in a stylish Gaba Learning Studio with the ability to design your own flexible schedule. We foster an international environment with various options for certification and ongoing support. The learning studio environments are modern and professional.

 

As an Instructor, you will enjoy the following:

 

  •  1-to-1 Student-focused teaching

  •  Motivated adult students

  •  Flexible schedule - build your schedule around your life

  •  Comfortable, modern, and business-like working environment (see our site for videos!)

  •  Incentives available

  •  Career advancement opportunities 

  •  10+ voluntary workshops for professional development

Click here to view testimonials from our current Instructors to hear first hand what it is like to teach with Gaba.

Job requirements

We are seeking enthusiastic and unique individuals who possess the following to experience living and teaching in Japan with Gaba: 

  • Solid people skills

  • Native-level English (all nationalities considered)

  • Ability to work independently

  • Desire to live and work in Japan

  • TEFL/ TESOL certification or ESL experience preferred

CURRENT AVAILABLE POSITIONS
Apply today for our currently available positions (interviews conducted via Google Meets):

  • Positions starting September 2026

Locations available: KANTO, KANSAI, CHUBU, and more!
